title: 16PCS Window Fly Traps, Sunflower Style Window Fly Stickers, Fruit Fly Trap Insect Flies Wasp Pest Killer - 4 Packs x 4 Traps Each Package
bullet_points: Exploits the attraction to light and warmth, discreet, attractive, practical, simple solution to bothersome house flies.
Non-toxic and safer to use around children and pets.
Powerful adhesive will hold largest houseflies, effective for up to 3 months.
Easy to remove will leaves no sticky trace when removed from the window.
Easy to use, come with a detailed use instruction. Value package total 16pcs.
